data.name: version_richTextBox.Text
data.value:
This is a free software used for generating DNS config of GSM/WCDMA/EPS mobility/session management and Wi-Fi Service.
Version 5.1 (2017-04-26) - To support Trust Wi-Fi with adding x-s2a-gtp service.
Version 5 (2017-04-25) - Add NAPTR and SRV selection for SGW and PGW query.
Version 4.1 (2016-08-19) - Fix a bug about the service setting
Version 4 (2016-05-03) - Support PGW of s2b service for Wifi
Version 3 (2015-11-05) - Fix sub forms with multiple opening
Version 2 (2015-10-31) - Support IPv6 configuration in DNS - Support blank space before and after when filling in the IP - Fix DNS querying a wrong old MME IP when ISC-RAU from 4G to 3G
Version 1 (2015-10-9) - DNS basic configuration generating - FQDN generating for DNS query - Convert between binary, decimalism and hexadecimal - Configuraiton can be saved as a file
